---
title: "CV"
---

```{=html}
<p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="assets/cv.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-dark btn-sm" download>
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
  </a>
</p>
```

## Education

**Institut d'Études Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po)** · Paris, France
*Master of Research in Economics* · 2023–2025

**Bard College** · Annandale-on-Hudson, United States
*Bachelor of Arts in Economics* · 2019–2023

---

## Experience

**Penn Wharton Budget Model** · Philadelphia, United States
*Analyst* · June 2026–Present

**Department of Economics, Trinity College Dublin** · Dublin, Ireland
*Predoctoral Research Assistant* · 2025–2026

**The Economic Journal, Royal Economic Society** · Paris, France
*Replicator* · 2024–2025

**Kiel Institute for the World Economy** · Remote
*Research Intern* · 2024

**Ceres, Inc.** · Remote
*Financial Regulation Intern* · 2023

**Bard College Department of Economics** · Annandale, United States
*Economics Tutor* · 2022–2023

**Mekong Strategic Group** · Phnom Penh, Cambodia
*Analytics Intern* · 2022

**OSUN – Economic Democracy Initiative** · Annandale, United States
*Student Fellow* · 2021

**Office of Illinois State Senator Heather Steans** · Chicago, United States
*Summer Intern* · 2020

---

## Skills

**Technical:** R, STATA, Python, Julia, LaTeX, Salesforce, Microsoft Office

**Methods:** Panel and Cross-sectional Econometrics, DSGE Modeling, Randomized Control Trials, Optical Character Recognition, Census Matching

**Languages:** English (Native), French (B1), Khmer/Cambodian (Basic Work Proficiency)

---

## Coursework

Advanced Macroeconomics I, II, III · Advanced Microeconomics I, II · Advanced Econometrics I, II, III · Development Economics · Public Economics · Economic History · Computational Economics · Political Economy · International Economics

---

## Leadership & Activities

**New York Southeast Asia Society** · Member · 2021–Present

**Young Scholars Initiative** · Student Member · 2019–Present

**Bard College Economics Club** · President · 2020–2022
